rationale: Both correctly pin the bug to PR #4792 and reproduce the exact code/comment from the real fix commit, matching the thread's core resolution. Y goes further, independently corroborating the actual maintainer comments (naming amy-why-3459 and akshatvishu, citing the precise commit hash a560ed18) exactly as the ground truth shows, and traces the full mechanism through the scheduler's _FULL_PAYLOAD_INPUT_STAGES/accumulate_full_payload_output gating and exact timeout log strings across more files. X reaches the same correct conclusion but with shallower grounding (fewer, less mechanistic citations) and no direct confirmation of the thread's actual state.
